description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a publish job that runs only for tags and pipeline triggers. In the publish job execute the commands: echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}' > .npmrc, npm install, npm run build, and npm publish --access=public, and set the stage to deploy. No services, caches, or artifacts are defined. The job publishes the built package to the public npm registry.
